Class TransactionDatabaseRepository

java.lang.Object
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.AbstractRepository<Transaction>
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
public class TransactionDatabaseRepository extends AbstractRepository<Transaction>
Repository for managing Transaction data in the database. Follows the singleton pattern — use getInstance() to get the instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(Transaction entity)
    Deletes a transaction from the database.
    void
    deleteTransactionsByCategory(Category category)
    Deletes all transactions linked to a specific category.
    void
    deleteTransactionsByUser(User user)
    Deletes all transactions belonging to a specific user.
    List<Transaction>
    findAll()
    Returns all transactions for the currently logged-in user, ordered by most recent first.
    List<Transaction>
    findByFilters(TransactionFilterForm transactionFilterForm)
    Returns transactions matching the given filter criteria.
    Optional<Transaction>
    findById(Long id)
    Finds a transaction by its id.
    List<Transaction>
    findLatestTransactions()
    Returns the 5 most recent transactions for the logged-in user.
    BigDecimal
    findTotalIncome()
    Returns the total income for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
    BigDecimal
    findTotalOutcome()
    Returns the total expenses for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
    Map<String, BigDecimal>
    getAreaChartData()
    Returns income data grouped by month for the area chart.
    static TransactionDatabaseRepository
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of this repository.
    Map<String, BigDecimal>
    getPieChartData()
    Returns expense data grouped by category for the pie chart.

    save(Transaction entity)
    Saves a new transaction to the database.
    void
    update(Transaction entity)
    Updates an existing transaction in the database.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static TransactionDatabaseRepository getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of this repository.
      Returns:
      the single TransactionDatabaseRepository instance

    • findById

      public Optional<Transaction> findById(Long id)
      Finds a transaction by its id.
      Specified by:
      findById in class AbstractRepository<Transaction>
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the transaction to find
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the transaction if found, or empty if not
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findAll

      public List<Transaction> findAll()
      Returns all transactions for the currently logged-in user, ordered by most recent first.
      Specified by:
      findAll in class AbstractRepository<Transaction>
      Returns:
      list of all transactions, empty list if none found
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • save

      public void save(Transaction entity)
      Saves a new transaction to the database.
      Specified by:
      save in class AbstractRepository<Transaction>
      Parameters:
      entity - the transaction to save
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • delete

      public void delete(Transaction entity)
      Deletes a transaction from the database.
      Specified by:
      delete in class AbstractRepository<Transaction>
      Parameters:
      entity - the transaction to delete
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • update

      public void update(Transaction entity)
      Updates an existing transaction in the database.
      Specified by:
      update in class AbstractRepository<Transaction>
      Parameters:
      entity - the transaction with updated values
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findByFilters

      public List<Transaction> findByFilters(TransactionFilterForm transactionFilterForm)
      Returns transactions matching the given filter criteria. Only filters on fields that are not null or empty.
      Parameters:
      transactionFilterForm - the filter criteria to apply
      Returns:
      list of matching transactions, empty list if none found
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • deleteTransactionsByCategory

      public void deleteTransactionsByCategory(Category category)
      Deletes all transactions linked to a specific category.
      Parameters:
      category - the category whose transactions should be deleted
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findLatestTransactions

      public List<Transaction> findLatestTransactions()
      Returns the 5 most recent transactions for the logged-in user.
      Returns:
      list of up to 5 latest transactions

    • findTotalIncome

      public BigDecimal findTotalIncome()
      Returns the total income for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
      Returns:
      total income as BigDecimal, or zero if none found
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findTotalOutcome

      public BigDecimal findTotalOutcome()
      Returns the total expenses for the logged-in user in the last 30 days.
      Returns:
      total expenses as BigDecimal, or zero if none found
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • deleteTransactionsByUser

      public void deleteTransactionsByUser(User user)
      Deletes all transactions belonging to a specific user.
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose transactions should be deleted
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • getPieChartData

      public Map<String, BigDecimal> getPieChartData()
      Returns expense data grouped by category for the pie chart.
      Returns:
      map of category name to total expense amount
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • getAreaChartData

      public Map<String, BigDecimal> getAreaChartData()
      Returns income data grouped by month for the area chart.
      Returns:
      map of month name to total income amount, ordered by month
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs
